advisory.reason: Baseline threshold (0.3) already yielded 50 nodes. Lowering threshold is likely unnecessary noise.

pilot_evaluation.reason: Uncertain topology or borderline metrics - Manual calibration needed.

model_policy_reason: Production Policy v1: Haiku-only due to graph density ceiling

questions.question: What are the symptoms of the driver installation failure issue on AMD platforms with Cisco Webex?
questions.justification: The synthesis text describes the symptoms, including some Hub drivers failing to start properly.

questions.question: What is the root cause of the HP EndUser Tool update failure for the E27m or E34m Scaler on AMD platforms?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that the issue is caused by the presence of old drivers, which leads to problems after the Scaler is reset.

questions.question: What is the recommended solution for the Cisco Webex-related driver installation failure issue on AMD platforms?
questions.justification: The synthesis text provides a suggested solution of uninstalling the Genesys Logic Generic USB Class Filter Driver and Evernote drivers via command line, but does not confirm if this fully resolves the issue.
